Class VisibleGridBlock

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.GridPane
tailFinder.view.game.VisibleGridBlock
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, Refreshable
public class VisibleGridBlock extends javafx.scene.layout.GridPane implements Refreshable
Renders the visible game world grid using JavaFX GridPane. Displays a 15x9 grid of blocks centered on the player position. Implements Refreshable to update the display each game frame. Handles win/loss condition checking.

  • Field Details

    • spawnRow

      private static int spawnColumn

    • map

      private static BlockMapLogic map

      private static boolean gameWin

  • Constructor Details

    • VisibleGridBlock

      public VisibleGridBlock(int difficult)
      Initializes the game world grid with the specified difficulty level. Loads the map and renders the initial view.
      Parameters:
      difficult - the difficulty level (0=Easy, 1=Normal, 2=Hard)

  • Method Details

    • refresh

      public void refresh()
      Refreshes the game world display each frame. Checks for win condition (player reached dog block), loss conditions (lava/slime), then renders a 15x9 grid of blocks centered on the player position. Areas outside the map are rendered as light blue empty space.
      Specified by:
      refresh in interface Refreshable

    • getSpawnRow

      public static int getSpawnRow()
      Gets the player's current row position on the map.
      Returns:
      the player's row index

    • setSpawnRow

      public static void setSpawnRow(int spawnRow)
      Sets the player's row position on the map.
      Parameters:
      spawnRow - the new row index

    • getSpawnColumn

      public static int getSpawnColumn()
      Gets the player's current column position on the map.
      Returns:
      the player's column index

    • setSpawnColumn

      public static void setSpawnColumn(int spawnColumn)
      Sets the player's column position on the map.
      Parameters:
      spawnColumn - the new column index

    • getMap

      public static BlockMapLogic getMap()
      Gets the BlockMapLogic instance managing the game world.
      Returns:
      the map logic

    • setMap

      public static void setMap(BlockMapLogic map)
      Sets the BlockMapLogic instance.
      Parameters:
      map - the new BlockMapLogic

    • setLocation

      public static void setLocation(int row, int column)
      Sets both the player's row and column position in one call.
      Parameters:
      row - the row position
      column - the column position
